chapters.notes: Prologue, Zechariah/Elizabeth, Gabriel, John announcement, Mary announcement, Mary/Elizabeth, Magnificat, John birth, Zechariah's speech release, Benedictus, Spirit/prophecy/mercy/covenant language.
Census, Bethlehem birth, manger, shepherd announcement, angelic peace, circumcision/name, temple presentation, Simeon, Anna, Nazareth return, twelve-year-old Jesus in temple.

Imperial dating, John in wilderness, baptism of turning/realignment for release, Isaiah way-preparation, fruits worthy of turning, sharing/justice instructions, baptism of Jesus, voice, genealogy back to Adam.

Wilderness testing, Spirit-filled return, Nazareth synagogue manifesto from Isaiah, rejected prophet pattern, Capernaum authority, unclean spirit release, Simon's mother-in-law, healing summary, proclamation mission.
Miraculous catch, calling Simon/James/John, cleansing of skin disease, paralyzed man release/rising, Levi call, table fellowship, fasting, new wine/wineskins.
Sabbath grainfields, Sabbath healing, choosing the Twelve, plain sermon blessings/woes, enemy-love, mercy, judging/release, tree/fruit, foundation sayings.
Centurion servant, widow's son at Nain, John question, Jesus' witness to John, wisdom/children saying, anointing woman with release/love/trust.
Women supporters, sower, lamp, family redefinition, storm calming, Gerasene release, Jairus, hemorrhaging woman, daughter's raising.

Sending the Twelve, Herod's question, feeding five thousand, Peter confession, passion prediction, cross-following, transfiguration, difficult healing, greatness, outsider in the name, and setting face toward Jerusalem.
Sending the seventy-two, peace/hospitality, woes, return joy, revelation to infants, Good Samaritan, and Mary/Martha.
Lord's Prayer, asking/seeking, Beelzebul controversy, stronger one, return of unclean spirit, sign of Jonah, lamp/body, woes to Pharisees and lawyers.
Hypocrisy warning, fear/courage sayings, Spirit speech, rich fool, ravens/lilies, treasure, watchfulness, faithful steward, fire/division, discerning the time.

translation_notes: Luke's prologue should preserve ordered-account language, eyewitness/servant-of-the-word language, and Theophilus as recipient.
Spirit language in Luke should preserve holy Spirit agency, prophetic filling, and joy without collapsing into later abstractions.
Magnificat/Benedictus/Nunc Dimittis material should preserve Israel covenant, mercy, justice reversal, and liberation language.
Basileia tou Theou should be rendered as reign/realm of the Divine, not merely a distant place.
Metanoia language should be rendered contextually as turning/realignment rather than guilt-heavy repentance.
Sozo should remain saved/healed where rescue and embodied wholeness overlap.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace the source-audited restored text.
Verse-number alignment must remain intact in both restored and mystical companion files.
Luke 1-2 preserves imperial setting, humble birth, shepherd witness, Mary heart-pondering, Simeon/Anna temple prophecy, and Israel/nations light language.

Luke 3-4 preserves John as ethical-turning prophet, genealogy back to Adam for universal-human scope, Spirit-led wilderness testing, and Jesus' Nazareth manifesto of good news, release, sight, and liberation.

Luke 5-8 preserves Luke's embodied discipleship arc: deep-water trust, table fellowship, Sabbath mercy, level-place reversal ethics, outsider trust, widow restoration, release/love/trust, women supporters, fruitful hearing, storm trust, Gerasene restoration, and daughter language.

Luke 9-12 preserves the Jerusalem road hinge: mission-sending, loaves, confession, transfiguration as exodus/departure, Samaritan non-retaliation, neighbor-as-mercy, Mary/Martha listening, prayer, Spirit gift, inner light, wealth/anxiety warnings, little flock, treasure-heart, and watchful stewardship.
next_actions: Continue Luke 13-16: narrow door, lament over Jerusalem, Sabbath healing, banquet teachings, cost of discipleship, lost sheep/coin/sons, unjust steward, rich man and Lazarus.

Add glossary entries or reuse shared Greek glossary hooks: logos, autoptai, hyperetai, Theophilus, charis, pneuma hagion, kyrios, sozo, eleos, diatheke, basileia, metanoia, eirene, apolytrosis, soteria, paraklesis, aphiemi, peirazo, euangelizomai, makarios, splagchnizomai, exodos, epiousios, Gehenna, and psyche.
